name: Nonogram Halloween
short_description: Use your logic to paint beautiful images in this relaxing puzzle. The gorgeous visuals and relaxing soundtrack will help you forget all your problems and have a great time!
detailed_description:
Use your logic to paint beautiful images in this relaxing and spooky puzzle. The gorgeous visuals and relaxing soundtrack will help you forget all your problems and have a great time! The pictures feature a spooky array of Halloween themes.

FEATURES

  • Relaxing puzzles
  • No timers, no pressure
  • 58 Levels
  • Unique solution for each puzzle
  • Increasing level dimensions, up to 25x25
  • Level progress is saved when you leave a level
  • Click the middle mouse button to measure the grid

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Turkish, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese
